tagline: Honest reviews of the best AI tools in 2026

hero.headline: Stop wasting hours on work AI can do in seconds
hero.subheadline: We test every major AI tool so you don't have to. Honest reviews, real comparisons, updated weekly.

author.name: Sarah Chen
author.title: AI Tools Analyst
author.bio: Sarah Chen has spent 4 years testing AI writing and productivity tools for agencies and solopreneurs. She's personally used Jasper, Copy.ai, Writesonic, and Grammarly for client projects and writes from hands-on experience, not spec sheets.
